prompt:
Use the face and l exact appearance of the man in the uploaded image as reference. Create an intense powerful gym supplement advertisement for "IRON" protein brand.

Person wearing: Fitted black sleeveless compression tank top, athletic shorts, extremely athletic and muscular powerful look.

Pose: Mid powerful flex pose showing strength, veins visible on arms, intense focused expression, giant oversized black and red supplement tub prop dramatically placed behind him.

Background: Dark dramatic background with deep red and black color grade, smoke and dust effect, massive bold heavy black typography "IRON" with red outline filling background.

Product: Supplement tub shown bottom right corner  with nutrition facts visible.

Tagline bottom center in bold red aggressive font: "Built different. Trained harder."

Top right watermark: "GPT image 2"

Floor: Dark gym floor with dramatic red light reflections glowing beneath.

Lighting: Hard dramatic studio lighting with smoke machine effect, ultra intense.

Style: Optimum Nutrition, Ghost campaign level.

Quality: Ultra HD 8K photorealistic, portrait 3:4 ratio.
